texto: A traveller moves among real people in their own milieu and learns from them, soaking up their wisdom and philosophy, their way of being in the world. A tourist simply hops from one tourist highpoint to another, skimming across the surface, cramming in quantity rather than quality, and comes away with his soul and imagination unchanged, untouched by the wonder of a life lived differently.
explicacao: Citação de Roxanne Reid sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “A traveller moves among real people in their own milieu and learns from them, soaking up their wi…” articula reflexao, africa, travel em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e viagem.
